'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 69''' was the sixty-ninth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[April 23]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*Crisis on the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]
*[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raiders]]
*[[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]]
*[[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Lake Country/Legends|Lake Country]]
*[[:Category:Droid manufacturers|Droid manufacturers]]
*[[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi Field Equipment]]
*[[TIE crawler/Legends|TIE Crawler]]
